codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review of the corrections follow-up confirmed the packet addressed the live preview mismatch directly inside `SalesReturnService` and paired it with focused `SalesReturnServiceTest` coverage for legacy invoice-scoped return movements. The diff realigns `alreadyReturned` and `remainingQuantityAfterReturn` preview math without broadening the corrections/control surface, and the milestone validators passed on the propagated branch, so this feature passes on reachable commit `3e1fec743ae45acce77e3be13ba63af09ae2957e` (`fix(sales): keep legacy return preview balances accurate`).

summary: Pass. Legacy invoice-scoped return history is now reflected in preview balances on commit `3e1fec743ae45acce77e3be13ba63af09ae2957e`, with focused sales-return regression coverage.
